Location: Fills entire torso from belly to shoulders
How To: Inhale deeply through the nose while silently sounding Ahhh in your mind. Let the breath fill your torso from the bottom up. Exhale slowly through the mouth.

Location: Broadly into the belly
How To: Place one hand on your belly. Inhale gently through the nose, letting only the belly rise. Exhale slowly and feel the belly fall.

Location: Expands sideways into the chest and ribs
How To: Inhale slowly for 4 counts, feeling the chest expand sideways. Exhale for 4 counts with a quiet Ccc sound on the lips.

Location: Draws deeply downward into the diaphragm
How To: Place both hands on your lower belly. Inhale through the nose and press your hands outward as the diaphragm drops. Exhale slowly.

Location: Empties the lungs completely on a full exhale
How To: Inhale for 4 counts. Exhale slowly for 8 counts with a quiet Ehhh sound. Squeeze every last bit of air out.

Location: Floods the entire frame from core to fingertips
How To: Take a full deep inhale from belly to chest. Exhale completely with a Fff sound through the teeth. Let the next inhale flood in naturally.

Location: Gathers throughout the body toward the center
How To: Inhale slowly through the nose with a gentle Guh sensation. Feel the breath collect at your center. Exhale fully, feeling grounded.

Location: Deep pull into the core with skull resonance
How To: Close your lips and inhale through the nose. Exhale with a steady Hmm hum. Feel the vibration spread through your chest and skull.

Location: Concentrates inward into the inner core
How To: Inhale sharply through the nose with a bright Eee sensation pulling inward. Hold for 2 counts. Exhale slowly.

Location: Pulses lightly through the chest and upper body
How To: Inhale playfully through the mouth with a bouncy Juh feeling. Exhale with a quiet smile, releasing any stiffness.

Location: Kicks oxygen dynamically through the mid-body
How To: Inhale quickly and powerfully through the nose. Hold briefly at the top. Exhale forcefully, keeping energy moving.

Location: Loads long and upward into the lungs
How To: Inhale slowly and fully with a long Lll sensation. Feel the lift from belly to crown. Exhale gently.

Location: Measured and even throughout the lungs
How To: Close your eyes and inhale mindfully through the nose. Exhale with a soft Mmm hum. Stay present with each breath.

Location: Nourishes through the nasal passages and sinuses
How To: Seal your lips and breathe only through the nose with a gentle Nnn awareness. Exhale the same way, slow and nourishing.

Location: Opens the entire chest and expands awareness outward
How To: Open your mouth slightly in an O shape. Inhale with an Ohh sense of opening. Exhale gently, maintaining openness.

Location: Powerful draw into the full chest cavity
How To: Inhale powerfully through the nose with a strong Puh drive. Exhale firmly, maintaining power all the way out.

Location: Quiets and stills the whole chest cavity
How To: Inhale so gently you can barely hear yourself. Make the breath as silent as possible. Exhale with equal quiet.

Location: Rises rhythmically through the ribs
How To: Inhale through the nose to a steady count. Exhale at the same count. Keep the Rrr sensation rolling through the ribs like a wave.

Location: Streams slow and steady through the full body
How To: Inhale slowly through the nose. Exhale with a long steady Sss sound through slightly parted lips.

Location: Fills the torso with a gentle lateral twist
How To: Inhale into the full torso. Gently twist to one side at the top. Exhale and return to center. Alternate sides each breath.

Location: Upward undulations from the core toward the crown
How To: Inhale and feel the breath rise upward. Exhale slowly from top to bottom, letting it undulate downward like a wave.

Location: Vibrates through the chest as a resonant column
How To: Inhale fully. Exhale with a strong buzzing Vvv vibration on the lips and teeth. Keep the buzz steady until empty.

Location: Widens across the back body and ribcage
How To: Inhale wide, feeling the ribs expand outward like wings. Exhale with a Wwh breath, feeling the back body open.

Location: Extends from the lower lungs on a long emptying exhale
How To: Inhale gently. Exhale for as long as possible with a quiet Xss sound. Then allow a natural rebound inhale.

Location: Yields to full airflow from throat to belly
How To: Open wide and inhale with a big Yah yawn. Let the release be full and uninhibited. Exhale with a sigh.

Location: Zeroes in with gentle vibration through the whole body
How To: Inhale slowly. Exhale with a deep low Zzz drone. Let the vibration deepen with each breath until the whole body feels still.
